anomalies.name: Blackbody Radiation Catastrophe
anomalies.description: Classical Rayleigh–Jeans law predicts infinite energy at high frequencies (UV catastrophe). Measured spectral curve diverges from classical prediction above ~1000nm

anomalies.name: Photoelectric Effect (Thermal Context)
anomalies.description: Threshold frequency independent of light intensity — classical thermodynamics cannot explain energy discretization
